zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Miles Stapleton II於大約1316年出生在英國越可爾貝達爾時，他的父親Sir Gilbert Stapleton28歲，母親Agnes FitzAlan28歲。他於大約1337年與Isolda結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1364年12月4日在英國諾福爾可英厄姆享年49歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可英厄姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Miles Stapleton II于大约1316年出生在英国越可爾貝達爾时，他的父亲Sir Gilbert Stapleton28岁，母亲Agnes FitzAlan28岁。他于大约1337年与Isolda结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1364年12月4日在英国諾福爾可英厄姆享年49岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可英厄姆。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Miles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin but uncertain derivation. Unlike most Norman names it is, as far as can be ascertained, not derived from any known Old French or Germanic name element. It may be a greatly altered pet form of Michael , which came to be associated with the Latin word miles ‘soldier’ because of the military attributes of the archangel Michael. However, the usual Latin form of the name in the Middle Ages was Milo. There is a common Slavic name element mil ‘grace, favour’, with which it may possibly have some connection. The name has been in regular use in England since the 16th century. See also Milo and Myles .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Miles Stapleton II was born about 1316, in Bedale, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Gilbert Stapleton, was 28 and his mother, Agnes FitzAlan, was 28. He married Isolda about 1337. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 4 December 1364, in Ingham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Ingham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Miles Stapleton II est né environ 1316, à Bedale, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gilbert Stapleton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes FitzAlan, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Isolda environ 1337. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 4 décembre 1364, à Ingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Ingham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Miles Stapleton II um 1316 in Bedale, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gilbert Stapleton 28 und seine Mutter Agnes FitzAlan 28. Er hat um 1337 Isolda geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 4. Dezember 1364 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Ingham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Ingham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Miles Stapleton II è nato il circa 1316 nel Bedale, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Gilbert Stapleton, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Agnes FitzAlan, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Isolda circa 1337. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 4 dicembre 1364, nel Ingham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Ingham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Miles Stapleton IIが約1316年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベダルで生まれた時，父Sir Gilbert Stapletonは28歳，母Agnes FitzAlanは28歳であった。約1337年にIsoldaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1364年12月4日にイギリスノーフォルクインガムで49歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクインガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Miles Stapleton II(이)가 대략 1316년 영국 요르크실르 베데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gilbert Stapleton(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes FitzAlan(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1337년 Isolda(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1364년 12월 4일 영국 노르폴크 잉함에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Miles Stapleton II nasceu aproximadamente 1316, em Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gilbert Stapleton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes FitzAlan, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Isolda aproximadamente 1337. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1364, em Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Miles Stapleton II родился около 1316 г. в местности бедеил, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Gilbert Stapleton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes FitzAlan, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Isolda около 1337 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 4 декабря 1364 г. в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Miles Stapleton II nació aproximadamente 1316, en Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Gilbert Stapleton, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Agnes FitzAlan, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Isolda aproximadamente 1337. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 4 de diciembre de 1364, en Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
